_meta.description: E5 (H5): route-2 STE training vs route-1 frozen baseline, robustness to defective inference noise. Identical models.pdnn.evaluate protocol for both net types. MID (64,32).
_meta.aggregation: per net-type: pooled over 2 training seeds x 5 noise seeds = 10 raw accs; mean and std are of those 10.
_meta.delta_convention: abs_delta = ste_mean - frozen_mean (positive => STE higher accuracy). 'established' = |abs_delta| > 2*sqrt(std_frozen^2 + std_ste^2). rel_degr = acc(ideal,S)-acc(cond,S) within a net-type; rel_degr_delta = rel_degr_ste - rel_degr_frozen (negative => STE degrades LESS from its own baseline).
_meta.det_tanh_acc_note: deterministic tanh-mode accuracy per net (no p-bit noise), for reference; STE and frozen nets need not share it.
